Index.label: SYS.INIT // LAB68CV.BUILDER STUDIO
Index.title: resume.build()
Index.description: Unlock your potential. Build your future. The ultimate Resume Builder engineered for professionals to create clean, structured, and ATS-friendly CVs in seconds.

Features.title: SYSTEM SPECS
Features.pdfDesc: Client-side rendering. Zero waiting time. Pixel-perfect brutalist PDFs generated directly in your browser.
Features.atsDesc: Clean semantic structures guaranteed to pass automated parsers and Applicant Tracking Systems.
Features.templatesDesc: Four professionally crafted architectural templates tailored for different career stages.
Features.freeDesc: No paywalls. No watermarks. Export your professional resume completely free, forever.

Import.label: PROFILE_IMPORT // NEW
Import.title: Import from Your Profiles
Import.subtitle: Start faster by pulling verified profile data into your CV draft.
Import.githubDesc: Fetch profile basics, top repositories, and inferred skills from your GitHub account.
Import.linkedinDesc: Upload your LinkedIn data export ZIP and map it into your resume fields instantly.
Import.behanceDesc: Bring portfolio projects and profile details from Behance to jumpstart your creative CV.

Templates.title: AVAILABLE TEMPLATES
Templates.executiveDesc: Dense, high-information layout for senior roles.
Templates.creativeDesc: Bold typography with avatar support for designers.

Testimonials.title: What Users Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback — 5 stars across the board
Testimonials.review1Body: Creating a CV is very easy with a clear and professional template.
Testimonials.review2Body: Minimalist interface, content-focused. Exactly the Harvard standard I was looking for. Very satisfied.
Testimonials.review3Body: The website is excellent for writing a professional CV — precise and to the point.
Testimonials.review4Body: Neo-brutalism interface paired with email login makes the whole workflow incredibly focused and seamless.
Testimonials.review5Body: Creating a CV is very easy, fast, with AI support. A product built with real passion.

AI.label: NEW // AI WRITING ASSISTANT
AI.title: Write Smarter, Not Harder
AI.subtitle: AI-powered suggestions help you craft compelling resume content — instantly.
AI.feature1Desc: Get context-aware content suggestions tailored to each section of your resume.
AI.feature2Desc: AI rewrites your bullet points in strong, action-oriented language that recruiters notice.
AI.feature3Desc: Generate full resume sections from a brief description in seconds.

CTA.title: Ready to build?
CTA.subtitle: Compile your professional history into a pixel-perfect document.

Sponsors.label: COMMUNITY // SPONSORS
Sponsors.title: BACKED BY YOU
Sponsors.subtitle: lab68cv.builder is an open-source project. If it has helped you land a job or save time, consider supporting our ongoing development.
Sponsors.emptyDesc: Be the first to get your logo proudly displayed here as an official supporter of an open-source tool.

Ecosystem.label: ECOSYSTEM // GROWTH
Ecosystem.title: Launch on Forg
Ecosystem.subtitle: Ready to showcase your product? Forg is the minimalist launchpad for hackers. Join the community and get your project noticed.

Common.announcementText: AI Writing Assistant is now live

BuilderImport.noPersonalFields: No personal fields detected from this profile.
BuilderImport.selectHint: Select what to merge into your current resume.
BuilderImport.githubHint: Import preview includes profile fields, top repositories, and inferred skills.
BuilderImport.behanceHint: Import preview extracts public profile details and portfolio projects when available.
BuilderImport.previewReady: Preview ready from {source} @{username}. Choose fields to merge.
BuilderImport.githubMissingInput: Add your GitHub username or profile URL first.
BuilderImport.behanceMissingInput: Add your Behance URL or handle first.
BuilderImport.forgMissingInput: Add your forg.to product ID, profile URL, or @username first.
BuilderImport.forgMultiFound: Multiple products found for {username}. Pick one and import.
BuilderImport.forgPickerHint: Found multiple strong matches on this profile. Pick one to import in one click.
BuilderImport.forgDevNotice: Forg ID now working, if there are any issues please write a ticket to developer below in footer
BuilderImport.linkedinZipHint: Free & full data — LinkedIn → Settings → Data Privacy → Get a copy
BuilderImport.linkedinZipInvalidFile: Please select a .zip file from your LinkedIn data export.
BuilderImport.linkedinZipFailed: Failed to parse LinkedIn ZIP. Make sure it's a valid LinkedIn data export.
BuilderImport.importSectionHint: Autofill your profile from a social source. Pick one to get started.
